title: Trivial SEGV with empty Iceberg table
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, format = 'Parquet', path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/t0/');
SELECT 1 FROM t0 SETTINGS iceberg_metadata_log_level = 'metadata'; --SEGV
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (value FLOAT, description VARCHAR NULL);
INSERT INTO t2 (value, description) VALUES (3.14, NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE description IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT from empty Iceberg table causes segmentation fault
